awesomeList.descriptionHTML: Useful resources for using IPFS and building things on top of it
awesomeList.description: Useful resources for using IPFS and building things on top of it

nodes.itemHTML: • DreamLink - Share files easily and quickly on the decentralized network. Sourcestars7
• IPFS-FPS - A completely decentralized first person shooter. Built with Unity, Fleek, Unstoppable Domans and Pinata.
• Bubble IPFS From URL Plugin - Bubble (no code platform) plugin for IPFS From URL integration
• ipns-pinstars1 - A command-line tool to pin stuff via ipns.
• Space - User-owned, encrypted, and open source personal file storage and sharing on IPFS and Textile, with decentralized backups in Filecoin. Sourcestars5
• Fleek - Open Web development platform for building, hosting, and storing sites and apps on IPFS, Filecoin, and the Internet Computer. Source
• Sharp Photos - Private end-to-end encrypted cloud photo storage.
• IPFS-forum - A web3 forum.You can get new ideas,reports,dicussions from this forum ,though you maybe are in a network-restricted area,all the contents will be updated qucikly by ipfs. Sourcestars6
• Almonit Browser Extension - Resolves ENS domains, this let users access .eth websites while offering maximum decentralization. Sourcestars10
• Monaparty - Token assets platform based on Monacoin and Counterparty. Contents bound to user assets are hosted by IPFS.
• ipfs-pinnerstars3 - A toolkit help upload files to IPFS pinning services.
• wbipfsstars0 - A command-line tool and Go package interface for wayback webpage to IPFS.
• Multiversestars46 - Multiverse is a decentralized version control system that enables peer-to-peer software development.
• Image Sever - Upload Images via JSON HTTP API; URI, URL, File and Base64 Sourcestars2
• Agregorestars256 - A minimal web browser for the distributed web. Supports downloading/uploading data from IPFS using the browser's fetch() API
• 2016-05-20: Changelog Podcast
• Downloading nodejs versions with nvm/n over IPFS
• Operating Systems Mirror & Archive (OSMA) - Mirror and archive of 29 established operating systems with 192 releases. Sourcestars1

• edChain - EdChain is a global network for education and careers. It uses blockchain and distributed web technologies to deliver educational content, even to those without broadband internet. Sourcestars3
• 2020-08-03: How to Create a Unity Game on IPFS using Pinata
• Everforo - Everforo is the next generation of online community groups build on top of IPFS.
• Robonomics Network - Ethereum network infrastructure for cyber-physical systems' integration into Smart Cities and Industry 4.0
• IPFS Setup Action - A GitHub Action to install and initialize go-ipfs to provision a cross-platform test environment on GitHub's CI platform. Sourcestars5
• gomobile-ipfsstars126 - IPFS and libp2p on Mobile, with Gomobile
• ShareX integration - ShareX is a file upload and manipulation tool that has a custom integration with IPFS
• galacteek - A multi-platform Qt5-based browser for the distributed web Sourcestars120
• ipcoronafsstars8 - A realtime service to scrape COVID-19 and SARS-CoV-2, storing on IPFS, DNSLink, and streaming over LibP2P pubsub
• dtube - Distributed video sharing with steem.it integrations, using ipfs for backend storage.
• infura.io - An Infrastructure: use API and developer tools provide secure, reliable, and scalable access to Ethereum and IPFS to help build decentralized application easier.
• IPFS Image Uploader - IPFS image uploader and viewer. Minerva is a storage plugin of Apache Drill that connects IPFS's decentralized storage and Drill's flexible query engine. Sourcestars16
• DWS - Deploy modern static websites with DWS and Enjoy secure and decentralized storage on IPFS.
• iprfcstars2 - IETF RFC downloader which stores RFCs on IPFS and indexes them with RTradeLtd/Lens.
• 7-piece Syzygy tablebases - Solutions for all chess endgames with up to 7 pieces. Sourcestars141
• Cooking Recipes - Around 50GB of formatted and unformatted cooking recipes. Source
• ipfs-actionstars50 - GitHub Action for delivery of static websites.
• Alexandria - Decentralized content publishing / monetization platform.
• Cyber - A decentralized Google alternative, built with the help of IPFS. Source
• Fission - App and website hosting powered by IPFS, including DNS automation, identity, and end-to-end encryption.
• Presidential Daily Briefs Source
• DtinyUrlstars14 - Decentralized URL shortening service based on IPFS.
• 2020-01-22: Building a Twitter Bot using IPFS Cluster
• 2020-01-04: Hands-on IPLD Tutorial in Golang Series
• Unstoppable Domains - Domains on blockchains
• WistfulBooks: LibriVox Audiobook Archive - Free public domain audiobooks from LibriVox.org packaged into a single page that lets you listen to audiobooks in your browser. Sourcestars1
• 2019-10-01: InterPlanetary Chat Application using Libp2p
• IPFS Drivestars86 - In browser file manager for IPFS.
• ipfsecretstars10 - Encrypt and decrypt IPFS files with a secret passphrase
• IPFS with TiddlyWikistars35 - IPFS with TiddyWiki is a TiddlyWiki plugin who aims to help developers, editors or users to save their wikis and attachments over IPFS.
• Temporal - Scalable IPFS Infrastructure with free starter package featuring turnkey APIs, toolkits and storage.
• Boom.FYI - An IPFS link shortening and access control service.
• Tellit - Encrypt files before uploading them using a keypair or a passphrase
• go-orbit-dbstars124 - This is a Golang port of OrbitDB that intends to be fully compatible with the original JavaScript version. OrbitDB is a serverless, distributed, peer-to-peer database.
• 2019-08-14: Managing storage in a Java application with IPFS
• 2019-03-10: The Case for a Decentralized Social Network
• Diffuse - Play music from your IPFS node, or any other cloud/distributed storage service you use.
• Peergos - Your private, but social, space online. Store and edit documents and media. Share files or folders with friends. Sourcestars916
• orbit-dbstars5.7k - OrbitDB is a serverless, distributed, peer-to-peer database that uses IPFS as its data storage and IPFS Pubsub to automatically sync databases with peers.
• go-stellar-ipfsstars22 - go-stellar-ipfs is a library that is a bridge between Stellar and IPFS.

• ipfs-video-gateway - Cloud-init your own IPFS gateway on a cloud provider and easily pin content through a simple web interface. Sourcestars10
• ipfs-deploystars772 - Zero-config CLI to deploy static websites: cd my-static-website && npx @agentofuser/ipfs-deploy
• 2019-05-12: The Complete Beginner's Guide to Deploying Your First Static Website to IPFS
• ipfs-publish - Continuous Delivery tool for delivery of static websites from Git providers to IPFS. Sourcestars51
• AirSecurestars109 - Decentralized two factor authentication app built on Textile & IPFS.
• Discussifystars34 - Discussify provides a real-time, peer to peer, and permanent discussion platform for anyone to join and participate.
• ipfs-search - Searching the universe since 2016.
• IPDRstars327 - IPFS-backed Docker Registry
• mahutastars188 - Mahuta is a plug and play service for your micro-service architecture allowing to collect, store and index data on IPFS and offering search functionalities (full text, query).
• Gorilla REPL viewerstars13 - Gorilla is a rich REPL for Clojure in the notebook style.
• dillo-ipfs - IPFS integration for the Dillo web browser.
• Public gateway status checker - Web app to check public states of IPFS gateways, including latency and gateway writable state. Sourcestars30
• ipfs-common - Some common tools, 1.CID to human readable cid, 2.cid and block name convert, 3. read the leveldb tools. Sourcestars0
• 2read - Convert article in current tab to readable form and upload it to writable node(s). Sourcestars96
• Sweet IPFSstars79 - Full node for Android
• Autonomica "IPFS Social Proof"stars98 - Autonomica is a Keybase-like Dapp for creating an identity and proving this identity via published social media and web proofs.
• 3Box - Create and manage your Ethereum Profile, and your personal data. Use the 3box-js library to integrate profiles into your dapp. Sourcestars358

• Distributed Apps with IPFS - Juan Benet at Fullstack Fest 2016 - This talk breaks down how to build a dynamic app on top of IPFS with CRDTs, pub/sub, and slick UIs. It also delves into new models for distributed computation, and the ethical importance of distributing the web.
• IPFS Simply Explained - Let's take a look at how IPFS works, how it can solve issue's like censorship and if it would really work across multiple planets!
• Juan Benet at Stanford 2015 - The talk includes a broad look at The IPFS Project, and a discussion on evolving the network stack through open source protocols R & D.

• Textile Build Series - A Free Online Workshop - A full Training Program to teach devs on how to build for the Decentralized Web. The series covers a ton of content, touch multiple parts of the IPFS stack and guides devs through building a simple DApp.
• brig - File synchronization with git like interface and FUSE filesystem. Sourcestars420

• IPFS Desktopstars3k - Run your IPFS node on your machine without having to bother with command line tools. Manage your node, add your files, easily change the settings... everything from just one interface.

• gatsby-plugin-ipfsstars100 - Adds support for deploying Gatsby websites to IPFS by ensuring that assets are relative.
• IPFS ID and Public Key QR Codes Demo - A demo app that uses windows.ipfs to show you a QR Code of your IPNS Link and of your Public Key. Sourcestars15
• enzypt.io - A website to buy and sell files through Ethereum and IPFS. Sourcestars25
• IPLD Explorer - Explore the Merkle Forest from the comfort of your browser Sourcestars53

• akasha - A Next-Generation Social Media Network, powered by Ethereum and embedded into IPFS.

• beetsstars10.1k - Beets has a plugin which allows for easy sharing of music libraries using IPFS
• Blokaly - A badge issuing, sharing and display platform based on IPFS.
• Boards - Distributed social platform that runs in the browser. Sourcestars201
• Cohortstars19 - A golang app to preset a threejs interface and get all of its assets out of IPFS.
• dapplestars295 - Dapple is a Solidity developer multitool designed to manage the growing complexity of interconnected smart contract systems.
• digx - Digix is an asset-tokenisation platform built on Ethereum and IPFS.
• Ethlance - First completely decentralised job market platform built on Ethereum and IPFS. Sourcestars606
• git-ipfs-rehoststars173 - A script to rehost your git repos in ipfs.
• Global Upload - File transportation service for IPFS, upload files to the future of distributed web.

• gogo.tattoo - Gogo Tattoo Project uses IPFS, DLTs and other modern technologies to offer tattoo artists and wearers an unbreakable lifetime record of their portfolios. gogo.tattoo app already has a feature to share works directly to IPFS.
